verdicts.note: Dean makes a single clear statement favoring fiscal responsibility, efficiency, and taxpayer restraint; the cited EMS transfer documents governance activity but does not independently establish a repeated restraint record.

review_notes: Adams' explicit investment proposal supports a modest expand placement, and both challengers' outside-government profiles support modest renewal placements. Dean's incumbent and regional-board service support the experience score; his spending confidence is reduced to match the dossier's single clear fiscal statement.
